expectations.evidence: Output contains structured Intake Brief with labeled sections: Work type, Entry phase, Recommended workflow, Key skills, Scope, Risks, Proposed Path, Alternative Approach
Selected agile-sprint workflow, with reasoning (SaaS + Q2 deadline)
Identified 2 risks: push notification infrastructure gap and @mention UX complexity
7-step path: spec-writing → system-design → api-design → task-breakdown → tdd → feature-development → code-review
Ends with '你同意这个路径吗？还是想调整？'
